---
title: "test_analyzer.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/test_analyzer.ts"
loc: 18
complexity: 2
logic_score: 7.00
style_score: 4.11
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 4.49
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix. It exists to support the broader ecosystem of system telemetry. Its role in the system is to provide foundational operational logic.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.0/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.1/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 0 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [crawlRepository](file://./src/tools/pennyone/crawler.ts)
- [*](file://fs/promises)
- [analyzeFile](file://./src/tools/pennyone/analyzer.ts)

### Exports
- `files`
- `success`
- `code`
